---
title: STAT 4194 Project
author:
- Andre Contreras
- Jiayi Gao
- Mitch Krenz
- Paarth Mahajan
- Tony Zheng
format:
    typst:
        mainfont: calibri
        df-print: paged
    revealjs: default
execute:
    cache: true
    autodep: true
---

## Packages Used

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(igraph)
library(rgexf)
```

# Data


# Model Fits

## AME Model
